name: Ramen Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 packages of chicken ramen (save seasoning packets for dressing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the shredded cabbage, chopped green onions, diced chicken, sliced almonds, and cooked ramen noodles.
2. Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the mixture.
3. In a small bowl, combine 1/3 cup oil, 1 cup red wine vinegar, 2 seasoning packets from the ramen, 1/4 cup soy sauce, salt, pepper, and sugar to taste.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad mixture and toss well to combine all ingredients.
